subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 776449964/250809689 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida Tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 776449964/250809689 at 16:32:39.78 UT
on 09 August 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
